theory.canonical_statement: Quantum coherence in the DAANSphere is stabilised by arranging superconducting resonators in a configuration where neighbouring resonators touch at discrete points (the pi-kissing topology), forming a network of weak links that distribute coherence.
theory.technical_interpretation: Quantum coherence in the DAANSphere is stabilised by arranging superconducting resonators in a configuration where neighbouring resonators touch at discrete points (the pi-kissing topology), forming a network of weak links that distribute coherence.

latex_blocks: omega_{\rm obs}= \frac{k\!\cdot\! u_{\rm em}}{k\!\cdot\! u_{\rm obs}}\;\omega_{\rm em},\qquad \mathcal D=\frac{1}{\gamma(1-\boldsymbol\beta\!\cdot\!\hat{\mathbf n})},\ \  u_{\rm obs}=\mathcal D\, u_{\rm em}

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the effective geometry or carrier space named by the entry title.

formula_latex_blocks: omega_{\rm obs}= \frac{k\!\cdot\! u_{\rm em}}{k\!\cdot\! u_{\rm obs}}\;\omega_{\rm em},\qquad \mathcal D=\frac{1}{\gamma(1-\boldsymbol\beta\!\cdot\!\hat{\mathbf n})},\ \  u_{\rm obs}=\mathcal D\, u_{\rm em}
equation_progression.interpretive_role: This makes the geometry admissible by imposing its internal compatibility law.

formula_latex_blocks: t_{\rm obs}=t_{\rm em}+\frac{|\mathbf R(t_{\rm em})|}{c},\quad \mathbf R=\mathbf x_{\rm em}(t_{\rm em})-\mathbf x_{\rm obs}(t_{\rm obs})
equation_progression.interpretive_role: This closes the entry by tying the local structure to a global topological invariant.
